description: Using the Activity Browser, create a new foreground database named 'My_Foreground' and add a custom activity to it. The activity must be named 'Recycled Aluminum Production' with reference product 'aluminium, recycled' and unit 'kg'. Then open the activity details and add a technosphere input exchange linking to 'Electricity, production mix, at grid' from the Energy_and_Materials database with an amount of 5 kWh per kg of output. Save all changes. The task is complete when the My_Foreground database contains the Recycled Aluminum Production activity with the specified electricity input exchange.
